Dance Flick (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,794,018Details
International Box Office $6,430,606
Worldwide Box Office $32,224,624
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,643,536 (41.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:80.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,450 opening theaters/2,459 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $41,132,856

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 22nd, 2009 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: September 8th, 2009 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual content throughout, and language
Running Time: 84 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Family Affair, Screenplay Written By the Star
Plot point: Dancing, Spoof
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, MTV Films, Wayans Brothers Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
